title: Algae Diagnosis (Algae Expert)
subtitle: Answer a few visual questions below, and our expert system will identify the algae type and provide treatment solutions.
q1_color: What is the dominant color of the algae?
q2_texture: What is its texture like when viewed or touched?
q3_location: Where is this algae growing the most?
q4_trigger: Are there any specific conditions in your aquarium?
reasonLocation: Growth location perfectly fits this algae's spread pattern.
reasonTrigger: Strongly confirmed by your aquarium's triggers/conditions.
